items.headline: Ranking the top 50 players in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs
items.description: As 16 teams face off for the ultimate prize in pro sports, these players will have the biggest impact.

items.headline: How WWE explains the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs' first round
items.description: With Wrestlemania and the start of the postseason this weekend, the traditions from one can help fans understand the other.

items.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
items.description: Plus, the Oilers and Ducks join the party. Here's what to watch, along with Sunday's highlights and stats.

items.headline: What holes will the Buffalo Bills address in the 2026 draft?
items.description: There's significant work to be done in the draft for the Bills who have question marks on the roster.

items.headline: Why Buccaneers GM Jason Licht says 'this draft is important'
items.description: After missing the playoffs in 2025, Tampa Bay's general manager knows this offseason could have long-term ramifications.

items.headline: Barry Cable acquitted of child sex abuse charges
items.description: Former footballer Barry Cable has been acquitted of a slew of historical child sexual abuse charges despite a judge finding the alleged victim was likely telling the truth.

items.headline: Coventry's Frank Lampard named Championship Manager of the Season
items.description: Frank Lampard has been named the EFL Championship Manager of the Season after guiding Coventry City to promotion.

items.headline: Young takes reins after Dragons part ways with Flanagan
items.description: Club legend Dean Young will coach winless St George Illawarra for the remainder of the NRL season after powerbrokers pointed to their "duty of care" as grounds for parting ways with Shane Flanagan.

items.headline: Rana five-wicket haul restricts NZ to 198
items.description: Kelly, the NZ opener, hit a fighting half-century

items.headline: RBC Heritage: Matt Fitzpatrick makes Ryder Cup dig after beating Scottie Scheffler in playoff
items.description: Matt Fitzpatrick played down the crowd reaction after he beat world number one Scottie Scheffler in a playoff for his second RBC Heritage title but the Ryder Cup winner could not resist a little dig at the pro-American gallery.

items.headline: Man City's Bernardo Silva compared to Paul Scholes, Fabio Cannavaro after masterclass vs. Arsenal
items.description: Bernardo Silva's virtuoso performance in Manchester City's win over Arsenal on Sunday has seen him likened to Paul Scholes and Fabio Cannavaro.

items.headline: 'Easy to get sapped': Tigers aim to rally on Anzac Eve
items.description: Nick Vlastuin predicts the big occasion will bring the best out of Richmond in their Anzac Eve AFL match against Melbourne.

items.headline: Butters umpire abuse charge thrown out by appeals board
items.description: Port Adelaide superstar Zak Butters has had his umpire abuse charge thrown out by the AFL appeals board after it was ruled a panel member's decision to listen to the original tribunal hearing from his car was a "miscarriage of justice".

items.headline: Arsenal are still Premier League title favourites, and here's why
items.description: Arsenal suffered a huge blow to their Premier League title hopes in Sunday's 2-1 defeat at Manchester City, but they still have reason for optimism.

items.headline: Erling Haaland's partner 'isn't happy' with the scratches left on his body by Premier defenders
items.description: Erling Haaland has joked that his partner "isn't happy" about the number of scratches on his body after the physical battles with Premier League defenders.
